db.disconected: Our services are down momentarily. We're working on a fix right now.
db.outOfSession: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
logIn.title: Log In
logIn.incorrectPassword: The password or email is incorrect.
forgetPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgetPassword.message: Enter your email and click send to receive password recovery instructions.
resetPassword.title: Change your password
resetPassword.legent01: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.legent02: Password must contain both uppercase and lowercase letters.
resetPassword.legent03: Password must include at least one of the following special characters: ( ! # $ % & ' ( ) * + , - . / : ; < = > ? @ [ ] ^ _` { | } ~).
